statement.informal: `ultimate_bearing` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (cohesion >= 0.0 ∧ cohesion <= C_MAX ∧ n_c >= 0.0 ∧ n_c <= N_MAX ∧ soil_unit_weight >= 0.0 ∧ soil_unit_weight <= GAMMA_MAX ∧ embedment_depth >= 0.0 ∧ embedment_depth <= D_MAX ∧ n_q >= 0.0 ∧ n_q <= N_MAX ∧ footing_width >= B_MIN ∧ footing_width <= B_MAX ∧ n_gamma >= 0.0 ∧ n_gamma <= N_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
